name: Nepal Digital Palika: Admin Platform + Git Analysis

project.name: Nepal Digital Palika
project.last_commit: bc54a5d - Revisiting branch, uncommitted changes, committed to work on documentation branch

state.last_action: Completed database reset, reseeding, and admin authentication setup. Fixed admin panel login system. Added comprehensive login credentials to documentation.
state.current_objective: Use git analysis to understand project health and guide Phase 2 fixes. Admin panel now fully operational with real data and working authentication.
state.system_status: ✅ STABLE - Database schema operational, admin panel live with real data and working auth, 238/255 tests passing (93.3%), git analysis pipeline active. 3 admin users created with sample content in Kathmandu.
state.ingestion_status: ✅ COMPLETE - 11 commits successfully analyzed via schedules repo
state.admin_auth_status: ✅ OPERATIONAL - Supabase Auth integration working, 3 admin users (super_admin, palika_admin, moderator)
state.content_seeding_status: ✅ COMPLETE - Sample content seeded in Kathmandu Metropolitan (8 heritage sites, 8 events, 6 blog posts)
blockers: 17 failing tests identified (4+4+6+3) - RLS issues, FK constraints, edge cases, test data generation
next_steps: 1. Use git metrics to understand code change patterns
2. Analyze test failures in context of commit history
4. Fix FK constraint on audit_log (priority HIGH)
7. Build content management features in admin panel (heritage sites, events, blog posts)

ingestion_metrics.health_assessment: Healthy - low deletion ratio indicates controlled code changes

available_analysis_queries: Daily commit metrics (SELECT DATE(committed_at), COUNT(*) FROM activities WHERE repo_name LIKE '%nepal%' GROUP BY DATE...)
Churn trends (SELECT SUM(insertions), SUM(deletions) per time period)
Author contributions (SELECT author_login, COUNT(*) GROUP BY author_login)
File change patterns (from commit messages and stats)
Code velocity trending (commits per day over time)
next_analysis_steps: Build Layer 1: Daily metrics aggregation table
Build Layer 2: Risk detection rules (inactivity spikes, deletion spikes, etc.)
Build Layer 3: Engineering Health Index (0-100 composite score)
Correlate test failures with commit patterns

milestone_pushes: 2026-02-28: Successfully integrated into schedules git analysis pipeline

relevant_files: database/ - Database utilities, type definitions, test fixtures
docs/ - Architecture diagrams, implementation plans, quick reference
mindstate.json - Project identity, thesis, architecture, and progress
workspace_snapshot.json - Current project state and inventory
key_documents: FINAL_SESSION_REPORT.md - Latest session summary with test analysis
TEST_SESSION_ANALYSIS.md - Detailed analysis of 17 failing tests

environment_vars.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: required - Supabase service role key (for migrations)

platform-admin-panel.pages: Admin dashboard pages (Admins, Roles, Permissions, Regions, Audit Log)

database_layer.status: ✅ STABLE - All migrations applied, 372 palikas seeded
database_layer.tables_count: 8 core tables (geographic, admin, role, content, audit)

admin_panel.status: ✅ OPERATIONAL with real data integration and working authentication
admin_panel.auth_integration: ✅ Supabase Auth with 3 admin users (super_admin, palika_admin, moderator)
admin_panel.sample_data: Kathmandu Metropolitan palika with 8 heritage sites, 8 events, 6 blog posts

git_analysis.data_storage: PostgreSQL activities table (separate database from project database)
git_analysis.ingestion_method: POST /ingest endpoint with repos and commit limit

deployment_readiness.sample_content: ✅ READY - Kathmandu Metropolitan populated with heritage sites, events, blog posts
deployment_readiness.tests: 🟡 BLOCKING - 17 tests failing (must fix before production)
deployment_readiness.documentation: ✅ COMPLETE - Comprehensive specs and reports with login credentials
deployment_readiness.git_analysis: ✅ READY - Successfully integrated with schedules pipeline

integration_with_schedules_repo.data_flow: Nepal Digital commits → GitHub API → Express /ingest endpoint → PostgreSQL activities table

team_handoff_notes.for_aaush: Project is stable and now integrated with git analysis. Admin panel fully operational with working authentication and sample data. Can resume immediately. Read FINAL_SESSION_REPORT.md for context, then tackle the 17 failing tests. Use git analysis metrics to understand code patterns and risk areas. Admin login credentials documented in database README.
team_handoff_notes.new_capability: Now have git metrics to guide development decisions (commit patterns, churn ratios, velocity trends). Working admin authentication system with 3 admin users and sample content in Kathmandu.
team_handoff_notes.admin_access: Use credentials in database README: superadmin@nepaltourism.dev / SuperSecurePass123! (full access), palika.admin@kathmandu.gov.np / KathmanduAdmin456! (Kathmandu content), content.moderator@kathmandu.gov.np / ModeratorSecure789! (moderation only)

snapshot_creator_notes: Successfully completed database reset and reseeding with full admin authentication system. Fixed admin panel login (changed from service role to anon key). Created 3 admin users with Supabase Auth and seeded sample content in Kathmandu Metropolitan. Updated documentation with complete login credentials. Admin panel now fully operational for content management testing.
